name: obsidian
description: Obsidian vault CLI — read, write, search, capture, triage, and ingest into your Obsidian vault from the terminal. Supports query status/items/actions for inbox depth and vault health.

query status.description: Vault health: reachable, file count, orphan count, missing links

query actions.description: Available CLI actions with commands and descriptions

capabilities.description: Read, write, search, and manage an Obsidian vault from the terminal. Use when the user wants to capture a note or idea, search the vault, triage inbox items, import scout or learnings data, or check vault health.
triggers: what notes do I have about X

note.description: A note file in the Obsidian vault

read.description: Read a note from the vault

append.description: Append text to an existing note

capture.description: Create a fleeting note in Inbox/

create.description: Create a new note with frontmatter

list.description: List notes in the vault or a folder

search.description: Search notes by keyword or semantic similarity

triage.description: Review and process notes in Inbox/

ingest.description: Import scout intel or orchestrator learnings into the vault

enrich.description: Suggest links and tags, detect orphan notes

maintain.description: Vault health checks: stale notes, missing frontmatter, orphans

resurface.description: Surface old notes relevant to a query

auto-capture.description: Capture learnings, workspace artifacts, and scout intel in one pass

health.description: Show vault diagnostics: inbox depth, orphans, stale captures, link density

index.description: Build or update the search index (required for semantic/hybrid search)
